name: Bedrock Configuration
description: Configure Claude Code to use Amazon Bedrock for AI model access. Enables enterprise-grade deployment with AWS billing and compliance features, ideal for organizations already using AWS infrastructure.
description_pt: Configurar Claude Code para use Amazon Bedrock para AI model access. Enables enterprise-grade implantacao com AWS billing e compliance features, ideal for organizations already usando AWS infrastructure.

name: Corporate Proxy
description: Configure proxy settings for corporate network environments. Allows Claude Code to work behind corporate firewalls and proxy servers while maintaining security compliance with enterprise network policies.
description_pt: Configurar proxy settings para corporate network environments. Allows Claude Code para work behind corporate firewalls e proxy servers while maintaining seguranca compliance com enterprise network policies.

name: Custom Headers
description: Add custom headers to API requests for specialized authentication or routing requirements. Useful for enterprise deployments with custom authentication systems or API gateways that require additional metadata.
description_pt: Adicionar custom headers para API requests para specialized authentication ou routing requirements. Useful for enterprise implantacaos com custom authentication systems or API gateways esse require additional metadata.

name: Vertex Configuration
description: Connect Claude Code with Google Vertex AI to access Anthropic's Claude models through Google Cloud Platform. Automatically configures all available Claude models (Sonnet, Haiku, Opus) with enterprise-grade infrastructure, billing, and security. Requi
description_pt: Connect Claude Code com Google Vertex AI para access Anthropic's Claude models through Google Cloud Platform. Automaticamente configures all available Claude models (Sonnet, Haiku, Opus) with enterprise-grade infrastructure, billing, e seguranca. Req

name: API Key Helper
description: Configure a custom script to dynamically generate authentication tokens. The script will be executed to obtain fresh API keys, useful for environments with rotating credentials or temporary access tokens. TTL is set to 1 hour (3600000ms).
description_pt: Configurar a custom script para dynamically generate authentication tokens. The script will be executed to obtain fresh API keys, useful para environments com rotating credentials ou temporary access tokens. TTL is set to 1 hour (3600000ms).

name: Force Claudeai Login
description: Restrict authentication to Claude.ai accounts only. This prevents users from logging in with Anthropic Console accounts, ensuring all access goes through the Claude.ai platform for consistent user experience and billing.
description_pt: Restrict authentication para Claude.ai accounts only. This prevents users de logging em com Anthropic Console accounts, ensuring all access goes through o Claude.ai platform para consistent user experience e billing.

name: Force Console Login
description: Restrict authentication to Anthropic Console accounts only. This ensures all usage is billed through the API billing system and prevents access via Claude.ai accounts, ideal for enterprise environments with centralized billing.
description_pt: Restrict authentication para Anthropic Console accounts only. This ensures all usage is billed through o API billing system e prevents access via Claude.ai accounts, ideal para enterprise environments com centralized billing.

name: Retention 7 Days
description: Set chat transcript retention to 7 days for privacy.
description_pt: Set chat transcript retention para 7 days para privacy.

name: Retention 90 Days
description: Set chat transcript retention to 90 days for extended history.
description_pt: Set chat transcript retention para 90 days para extended history.

name: Bash Timeouts
description: Configure timeout settings for bash command execution. Prevents long-running commands from hanging indefinitely while allowing sufficient time for complex operations like builds and deployments.
description_pt: Configurar timeout settings para bash command execution. Prevents long-running commands de hanging indefinitely while allowing sufficient time for complex operations like builds e implantacaos.

name: Development Utils
description: Enhanced development environment configuration with useful utilities and debugging features. Includes built-in ripgrep usage, terminal title updates, and directory maintenance for improved developer experience.
description_pt: Enhanced development environment configuration com useful utilities e debugging features. Includes built-in ripgrep usage, terminal title updates, and directory maintenance para improved developer experience.

name: Friday Deploy Warning
description: Replaces the default spinner verbs with a humorous 'Don't Deploy On Fridays' reminder. Every time Claude is thinking, the spinner will display this message as a lighthearted warning against risky end-of-week deployments.
description_pt: Replaces o default spinner verbs com a humorous 'Don't Implantar On Fridays' reminder. Every time Claude is thinking, the spinner will display este message as a lighthearted warning against risky end-of-week implantacaos.

name: Performance Optimization
description: Optimize Claude Code performance by adjusting token limits and disabling non-essential features. Reduces API costs and improves response times for development workflows focused on code quality over conversational features.
description_pt: Otimizar Claude Code desempenho por adjusting token limits e disabling non-essential features. Reduces API costs and improves response times para development fluxo de trabalhos focused no codigo quality over conversational features.

name: Privacy Focused
description: Maximize privacy by disabling all telemetry, error reporting, and non-essential network traffic. Ideal for sensitive development environments or organizations with strict data privacy requirements.
description_pt: Maximize privacy por disabling all telemetry, erro reporting, e non-essential network traffic. Ideal para sensitive development environments ou organizations com strict data privacy requirements.

name: Git Flow Settings
description: Complete Git Flow configuration with statusline, permissions, environment variables, and workflow enforcement. Displays real-time Git Flow status, prevents direct pushes to main/develop, allows feature/release/hotfix operations, and configures Git Fl
description_pt: Complete Git Flow configuration com statusline, permissions, environment variables, e fluxo de trabalho enforcement. Displays real-time Git Flow status, prevents direct pushes para main/develop, allows feature/release/hotfix operations, and configure

name: AWS Credentials
description: Configure AWS credential management for Bedrock integration. Set up custom scripts for credential refresh and export, useful for environments with rotating AWS credentials or SSO integration.
description_pt: Configurar AWS credential management para Bedrock integration. Configurar custom scripts for credential refresh e export, useful for environments com rotating AWS credentials ou SSO integration.

name: Company Announcements
description: Display custom company announcements in Claude Code. Replace the example messages in the 'companyAnnouncements' array with your own organization's announcements, guidelines, or reminders.
description_pt: Display custom company announcements em Claude Code. Replace o example messages in the 'companyAnnouncements' array com seu own organization's announcements, guidelines, ou reminders.

name: Custom Model
description: Override the default Claude model with a custom or alternative model configuration. Useful for testing new model versions or using organization-specific model deployments.
description_pt: Override o default Claude model com a custom ou alternative model configuration. Useful para testes new model versions or usando organization-specific model implantacaos.

name: Git Commit Settings
description: Configure git commit behavior including the co-authored-by signature. Disable the Claude co-authorship line if you prefer clean commit history or have organizational policies against AI attribution.
description_pt: Configurar git commit behavior including o co-authored-by signature. Disable the Claude co-authorship line if you prefer clean commit history ou have organizational policies against AI attribution.

name: Spinner Tips Override
description: Customize the spinner tips shown while Claude is thinking. Replace the example tip string in the 'tips' array with your own custom messages. Set 'excludeDefault: true' to show only your custom tips, or 'false' to mix them with the built-in ones.
description_pt: Customize o spinner tips shown while Claude is thinking. Replace the example tip string em the 'tips' array com seu own custom messages. Set 'excludeDefault: true' para show only your custom tips, ou 'false' to mix them with the built-in ones.

name: Disable Risky Servers
description: Disable specific MCP servers that may pose security risks or are not needed for your workflow. This blacklist approach allows most servers while blocking potentially problematic integrations.
description_pt: Disable specific MCP servers esse may pose seguranca risks ou are not needed para seu fluxo de trabalho. This blacklist approach allows most servers while blocking potentially problematic integrations.

name: Enable All Project Servers
description: Automatically approve and enable all MCP servers defined in project .mcp.json files. This setting bypasses manual approval prompts for project-defined MCP servers, streamlining development workflow in trusted environments.
description_pt: Automaticamente approve e enable all MCP servers defined em projeto .mcp.json arquivos. This setting bypasses manual approval prompts para project-defined MCP servers, streamlining development fluxo de trabalho in trusted environments.

name: Enable Specific Servers
description: Enable only specific MCP servers from .mcp.json files. This provides granular control over which MCP integrations are active, allowing you to selectively enable trusted or required servers while blocking others.
description_pt: Enable only specific MCP servers de .mcp.json arquivos. This provides granular control over which MCP integrations are active, allowing you para selectively enable trusted ou required servers while blocking others.

name: MCP Timeouts
description: Configure timeout settings for MCP server operations. Adjust startup and tool execution timeouts to accommodate slower systems or complex MCP server operations while preventing indefinite hangs.
description_pt: Configurar timeout settings para MCP server operations. Adjust startup e tool execution timeouts para accommodate slower systems ou complex MCP server operations while preventing indefinite hangs.

name: Use Haiku
description: Configure Claude Code to use Claude 3.5 Haiku model for faster responses.
description_pt: Configurar Claude Code para use Claude 3.5 Haiku model para faster responses.

name: Use Sonnet
description: Configure Claude Code to use Claude 3.5 Sonnet model.
description_pt: Configurar Claude Code para use Claude 3.5 Sonnet model.

name: Glm Coding Plan
description: GLM Coding Plan - Top-tier open-source coding performance powered by GLM-4.6, the top-ranked model on Code Arena leaderboard. Starting at $3/month with state-of-the-art reasoning, debugging, and code generation. Seamlessly integrates with Claude Code
description_pt: GLM Coding Plan - Top-tier open-source coding desempenho powered por GLM-4.6, o top-ranked model no Code Arena leaderboard. Starting at $3/month com state-of-the-art reasoning, debugging, e codigo generation. Seamlessly integrates with Claude Code

name: Additional Directories
description: Grant access to additional directories outside the current project. Useful for monorepo setups, shared libraries, or when working with documentation stored in separate repositories.
description_pt: Grant access para additional directories outside o current projeto. Useful para monorepo setups, shared libraries, ou when working com documentacao stored em separate repositories.

name: Allow Git Operations
description: Allow common git operations for version control workflow. Permits git status, diff, add, commit, and push operations while maintaining security by requiring explicit permission for potentially destructive operations.
description_pt: Allow common git operations para version control fluxo de trabalho. Permits git status, diff, add, commit, e push operations while maintaining seguranca por requiring explicit permission for potentially destructive operations.

name: Allow NPM Commands
description: Allow common npm development commands (lint, test, build, start).
description_pt: Allow common npm development commands (lint, test, build, start).

name: Deny Sensitive Files
description: Deny access to sensitive files like environment variables and secrets.
description_pt: Deny access para sensitive arquivos like environment variables e secrets.

name: Development Mode
description: Comprehensive permissions for active development. Allows most development tools and operations while maintaining security boundaries. Ideal for trusted development environments where productivity is prioritized.
description_pt: Comprehensive permissions para active development. Allows most development tools e operations while maintaining seguranca boundaries. Ideal for trusted development environments where productivity is prioritized.

name: Read Only Mode
description: Restrict Claude to read-only operations for code review and analysis. Prevents any file modifications or command executions, making it safe for exploring unfamiliar codebases or conducting security audits.
description_pt: Restrict Claude para read-only operations para codigo review e analysis. Prevents any arquivo modifications ou command executions, making it safe for exploring unfamiliar codebases or conducting seguranca audits.

name: Asset Pipeline Controller Statusline
description: Asset pipeline controller monitoring texture processing, model optimization, audio compression, and platform-specific variants. Tracks asset processing queue status, file size optimizations, LOD generation progress, and compression ratios across diff
description_pt: Asset pipeline controller monitoring texture processing, model optimization, audio compression, e platform-specific variants. Tracks asset processing queue status, arquivo size optimizations, LOD generation progress, and compression ratios across dif

name: Bug Circus Statusline
description: Turn debugging into a circus performance! Watch performers juggle bugs while the audience reacts to your coding show with dynamic applause and reactions. Displays: Show number (incremental counter), Rotating performers (🤹 juggler, 🎭 drama, 🎪 circus,
description_pt: Turn debugging into a circus desempenho! Watch performers juggle bugs while o audience reacts para seu coding show com dynamic applause e reactions. Displays: Show number (incremental counter), Rotating performers (🤹 juggler, 🎭 drama, 🎪 circus,

name: Code Casino Statusline
description: Roll the dice with your code! Persistent chip tracking with wins and losses based on random dice rolls. Watch your coding fortune rise and fall. Displays: Chip count (starts at 100, persistent across session), Two random dice (1-6 each), Dice sum cal
description_pt: Roll o dice com seu codigo! Persistent chip tracking with wins e losses based no random dice rolls. Watch your coding fortune rise and fall. Displays: Chip count (starts at 100, persistent across session), Two random dice (1-6 each), Dice sum cal

name: Code Spaceship Statusline
description: Navigate through space on your coding journey. Track fuel consumption, travel distance, and warp levels. The ship's condition reflects your coding momentum. Displays: Ship condition (🚀 full fuel 80%+, 🛸 low fuel 40-80%, 🆘 emergency <40%), Warp level
description_pt: Navigate through space no seu coding journey. Rastrear fuel consumption, travel distance, e warp levels. The ship's condition reflects your coding momentum. Displays: Ship condition (🚀 full fuel 80%+, 🛸 low fuel 40-80%, 🆘 emergency <40%), Warp level

name: Colorful Statusline
description: Colorful status line with ANSI color codes for enhanced visual appeal. Uses colors to distinguish between different information types: blue for model, green for directory, yellow for git branch.
description_pt: Colorful status line com ANSI color codigos para enhanced visual appeal. Uses colors para distinguish between different information types: blue for model, green for directory, yellow for git branch.

name: Command Statusline
description: Configure a custom status line using a shell command that receives session context via JSON stdin. The script can display model name, current directory, git branch, or any dynamic information. Create your script at ~/.claude/statusline.sh and make it
description_pt: Configurar a custom status line usando a shell command esse receives session context via JSON stdin. The script can display model name, current directory, git branch, ou any dynamic information. Criar seu script at ~/.claude/statusline.sh e make it

description: Real-time Claude Code context usage monitor with visual progress bars, color-coded alerts, session analytics (cost, duration, lines changed), and auto-compact warnings. Tracks conversation context consumption and provides visual feedback to prevent s

description_pt: Dive deep into an ocean de codigo. Rastrear depth based no arquivo count, encounter different sea creatures, e occasionally discover treasure while surfing o data waves. Displays: Random wave patterns (🌊 ocean, 🌀 whirlpool, 💧 droplet, ⚡ electric, 🔥 f

description: Deadline day statusline with git branch, changed files count, and countdown timer to a configurable deadline. Color-coded urgency. Set DEADLINE_TIME env var (HH:MM, default 15:30) to customize.
description_pt: Deadline day statusline com git branch, changed arquivos count, e countdown timer para a configurable deadline. Color-codigod urgency. Set DEADLINE_TIME env var (HH:MM, default 15:30) to customize.

name: Emotion Theater Statusline
description: A theatrical display of coding emotions and activities. Random mood faces and dynamic activity detection based on file types present in your project. Displays: Random mood faces (😴 sleepy, 😅 laughing, 🤔 thinking, 😎 cool, 🤯 exploding, 🥳 partying, 😤 hu

description_pt: Game engine desempenho monitor tracking FPS targets, draw calls, memory usage, e build optimization. Displays target framerate compliance, polygon count optimization status, texture memory usage, build size tracking across platforms, and performan

name: Git Branch Statusline
description: Display current model, directory, and git branch with change indicators in the status line. Shows model name, folder name, active branch, and count of uncommitted changes for complete development context.
description_pt: Display current model, directory, e git branch com change indicators em o status line. Shows model name, folder name, active branch, and count de uncommitted changes para complete development context.

name: Git Flow Status
description: Display comprehensive Git Flow status with branch type, sync status, and change indicators. Shows branch type icon (🌿 feature, 🚀 release, 🔥 hotfix), commits ahead/behind, modified/added/deleted files, and merge target branch.
description_pt: Display comprehensive Git Flow status com branch type, sync status, e change indicators. Shows branch type icon (🌿 feature, 🚀 release, 🔥 hotfix), commits ahead/behind, modified/added/deleted arquivos, and merge target branch.

name: Minimal Statusline
description: Simple minimal status line showing only model name and current directory. Clean and distraction-free display perfect for focused development sessions where you want minimal visual clutter.
description_pt: Simple minimal status line showing only model name e current directory. Clean and distraction-free display perfect para focused development sessions where you want minimal visual clutter.

name: Multiplatform Build Status Statusline
description: Multi-platform build status tracker for game development showing build completion across iOS, Android, PC, and WebGL platforms. Displays build progress percentages, platform-specific error counts, app store readiness indicators, and binary size compl
description_pt: Multi-platform build status tracker para game development showing build completion across iOS, Android, PC, e WebGL platforms. Displays build progress percentages, platform-specific erro counts, app store readiness indicators, and binary size compl

description: A virtual pet that evolves based on your coding activity. Health and happiness change over time, creating an emotional connection with your coding sessions. Displays: Pet emoji (🐱 healthy, 😺 good, 😿 tired, 💀 exhausted), Mood emoji (✨ very happy, 😊 ha

description_pt: Display comprehensive projeto information including model, directory, Node.js version, e Claude Code version. Perfect para multi-project environments where you need full context about seu development setup.
